name: @bytesbrains/maktub-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for the Maktub Protocol — decentralized conditional execution engine on Base L2
author: BytesBrains

scripts.copy:wasm: mkdir -p dist/veil/wasm && cp src/veil/wasm/warden_wasm.js src/veil/wasm/warden_wasm_bg.wasm src/veil/wasm/warden_wasm.d.ts src/veil/wasm/warden_wasm_bg.wasm.d.ts dist/veil/wasm/
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
